skills.name: Signed Reviews — Review Verification Guide
skills.description: Understand how review verification works across every major platform. Covers the 5-level verification spectrum from Level 0 (no verification) to Level 4 (processor-attested via Stripe), with platform-specific breakdowns for Trustpilot, Yotpo, Judge.me, Reviews.io, and more.

skills.name: Signed Reviews — Fake Review Detection Guide
skills.description: How fake reviews are manufactured, detected, and structurally prevented. Covers click farms, AI generation, brushing schemes, and the economics of the $152B fake-review industry.

skills.name: Signed Reviews — FTC Fake Review Rules (16 CFR Part 465)
skills.description: Complete guide to the FTC's 2024 Trade Regulation Rule on Consumer Reviews. What's banned, who it applies to, penalties, and how to achieve structural compliance.

skills.name: Signed Reviews — Trustpilot Alternatives Comparison
skills.description: Comprehensive ranking of 10 Trustpilot alternatives scored by verification method, covering SaaS, e-commerce, local business, and enterprise. Includes pricing, platform comparison table, and recommendations by business type.

skills.name: Signed Reviews — Stripe Verified Reviews Guide
skills.description: How Stripe-native review verification works: read-only OAuth, processor-attested verification (Level 4), cryptographic signing, and automatic refund handling. The definitive technical guide to Stripe-based review collection.

metadata.description: Processor-attested verified reviews for Stripe businesses. Every review is independently verified against a confirmed Stripe charge.
